name: tw-dev
description: Dev-phase SDLC skills for any kind of development: orchestrate, requirements, design, coding (web, API, CLI, library, mobile, data/ML — single or multi-component with interface contracts), QA strategy (E2E/acceptance/performance), and compliance — stack and project-type agnostic

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Entry point — drives the full SDLC workflow from a Jira ticket, GitHub issue, Confluence page, or plain text requirement

skills.name: requirements
skills.description: Write user stories, acceptance criteria, and BDD scenarios

skills.name: design
skills.description: Create HLD, LLD, ADRs, and tech-stack evaluations saved to docs/

skills.name: coding
skills.description: Generate code and tests for any project type — web, API, CLI, library, mobile, data/ML

skills.name: qa
skills.description: E2E scenarios, acceptance mapping, test data strategy, and performance plan

skills.name: compliance
skills.description: HIPAA, PCI DSS, GDPR, SOC 2 code-level compliance review

atlassian.description: Atlassian Remote MCP — Jira ticket fetch, JQL search, Confluence page fetch. Uses OAuth browser authentication — no API token needed. See docs/mcp-setup.md.
